archetypes.name: Fighter
archetypes.silhouette: compact aerospace fuselage, single cockpit canopy set far forward, swept main wing surfaces with conformal hardpoints, twin canted vertical stabilizer fins at the tail, twin large rear thruster bells
features_pool: single bubble cockpit canopy set far forward
swept-back delta or trapezoidal main wing surfaces
twin canted vertical stabilizer fins
underwing conformal hardpoint pylons
twin oversized afterburner thruster nozzles flanking the tail
chin-mounted forward sensor pod
wingtip reaction-control vernier thruster clusters
nose-cone forward radome with painted unit identification markings
archetypes.scale_note: small craft — single-pilot scale, comparable in length to a contemporary jet fighter

archetypes.name: Corvette
archetypes.role: small fast multi-role escort space warship
archetypes.silhouette: elongated narrow armored hull oriented along its long axis like a gun barrel, blocky forward command block stepped up from the dorsal spine, exposed rear engine block with multiple thruster bells — a vertically-thick armored vessel, NOT a horizontally flat platform
features_pool: low-profile stepped armored command block forward, integrated into the dorsal hull
dorsal turret battery row with cylindrical cannon turrets
ventral sensor blister
exposed rear quad main thruster bells
side-mounted reaction-control vernier clusters
amidships antenna mast with multiple radar dishes
armored bow with reinforced ram prow

archetypes.name: Frigate
archetypes.role: medium escort and patrol space warship
archetypes.silhouette: wedge-shaped armored hull projecting forward, raised aft superstructure block, prominent armored bow ram prow, twin side hangar sponsons or flank turret sponsons — vertically-thick armored vessel reading as a battleship form
features_pool: armored wedge-shaped bow with ram prow
twin-tier aft superstructure block with horizontal viewport bands
side sponson turret mounts running along the flanks
rear engine cluster of four to six exposed main drive bells
communications mast cluster on the dorsal spine
ventral missile silo grid line
low-profile armored command block with horizontal viewport slits

archetypes.name: Cruiser
archetypes.role: main-line capital space warship and squadron flagship
archetypes.silhouette: broad armored hull with a layered tiered armored superstructure block rising from the dorsal spine, multiple gun turret tiers, massive exposed aft engine block — vertically-thick armored fortress in space, NOT a horizontally flat platform
features_pool: tiered main beam-cannon turret batteries on the dorsal spine
armored stepped command block amidships, integrated into the hull rather than perched on top
side broadside cannon turret rows
massive exposed aft engine block with six or more main thruster bells
dorsal radar dome cluster
armor belt with riveted plating along the flanks
secondary anti-fighter turret rings ringing the upper hull
archetypes.scale_note: large space warship, kilometer-scale capital vessel

archetypes.name: Battleship
archetypes.silhouette: massive armored hull with a tall armored command block rising vertically from the dorsal spine, triple-barrel main turrets fore and aft, armored citadel amidships, exposed rear mega-engine block — vertically-thick armored dreadnought form
features_pool: triple-barrel main beam-cannon turrets fore and aft
tall stepped armored command block with banded horizontal viewport tiers
armored citadel midsection with bolted rivet courses
rows of secondary anti-fighter turrets along the flanks
armored bow with massive ram prow and forward-mounted prow main cannon
massive exposed aft mega-engine block with eight or more main thruster bells
fleet command antenna mast cluster

archetypes.name: Carrier
archetypes.role: modular bipedal-machine carrier — a space WARSHIP that carries and launches piloted bipedal combat machines via forward-firing catapults, NOT a real-world ocean-going aircraft carrier
archetypes.silhouette: Vertically-thick block-shaped armored hull oriented along its long axis like an armored battleship form, NOT a horizontally flat platform. The forward third of the hull splits into a wide longitudinal launch channel running fore-to-aft along the centerline — the catapult tunnel exits face-first out the bow opening. Two large outboard hangar sponsons run parallel along the flanks of the hull, attached as modular bolted-on extensions. A low-profile stepped armored command block is integrated INTO the dorsal spine amidships — it sits flush within the hull contour with horizontal viewport bands, NOT perched on top as a separate tower and NOT shaped like an animal or human head. The rear is an exposed engine framework cradle holding multiple large thruster bells. Heavily greebled with antenna clusters and exposed conduit runs. Asymmetric bolt-on modules give it a lived-in industrial feel.
features_pool: longitudinal forward launch channel running along the centerline of the bow
centerline forward catapult tunnel exiting face-first out the bow opening
low-profile stepped armored command block integrated flush into the dorsal spine, with horizontal viewport bands
two outboard modular hangar sponsons running parallel along the flanks, each with its own forward catapult exit
exposed rear engine framework cradle holding four to eight large thruster bells
dorsal beam-cannon turret pair amidships
armor belt with riveted plating, asymmetric bolt-on hangar modules
secondary missile launcher recesses along the flanks
antenna cluster and exposed conduit greebles on the upper hull
archetypes.scale_note: large space warship carrier class, kilometer-scale, designed to deploy bipedal combat machines via forward-firing bow catapults — a vertically-thick armored hull that happens to carry machines, NOT a horizontally flat platform

archetypes.name: Freighter
archetypes.silhouette: blocky utilitarian hull with modular cargo container racks stacked along the spine, small offset forward crew habitat module, oversized aft industrial engine block with exposed thruster bells
features_pool: modular cargo container racks stacked along the spine
small offset crew habitat module forward
oversized industrial aft engine block with multiple exposed thruster bells
exposed structural truss frame
loading crane arms folded against the hull
external piping and conduit runs
civilian hazard stripe markings and corporate livery
archetypes.scale_note: large civilian space freighter, freight hauler class

archetypes.name: Mining / Industrial
archetypes.role: asteroid mining and industrial work space vessel
archetypes.silhouette: asymmetric utilitarian rig, large forward processing maw or grinder intake, exposed articulated work arms, attached refinery tanks and silos, exposed rear thruster cluster
features_pool: massive forward ore-processing intake jaw or rotating grinder maw
articulated industrial work arms with grippers
external refinery tanks and silos bolted to the hull
exposed pipework and conveyor runs
asymmetric utility platforms welded onto the hull
heavy reinforced collision bumper bow
rotating sorting drum amidships
archetypes.scale_note: medium industrial space vessel, function over form
